message:
✨ Simplify saved mission CTA in demo mode (#3056)

Replace yellow banner + "Get KubeStellar Console" button with quiet
text: "Mission imported. Install KubeStellar Console locally to run
it against your clusters." No action needed on console.kubestellar.io
since users can't run missions there anyway.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,7 +11,6 @@ import { Save, Maximize2, Play, - Rocket, Sparkles, ThumbsUp, ThumbsDown, @@ -680,24 +679,9 @@ export function MissionChat({ mission, isFullScreen = false, fontSize = 'base' a ) : mission.status === 'saved' ? (
{isDemoMode ? ( -
-
- -

- Running missions requires a live cluster -

-
-

- Install KubeStellar Console locally to connect your clusters and run this mission with AI. -

- -
+

+ Mission imported. Install KubeStellar Console locally to run it against your clusters. +

) : (
